channel.title: UGA CVM Faculty Publications
channel.description: New publications by University of Georgia College of Veterinary Medicine faculty, detected via PubMed and ORCID.

item.title: Probiotic Prophylaxis for Enterococcus cecorum Prevalence in the Free Thoracic Vertebra of Broiler Chickens.
item.description: Authors: Jones Matthew K, Hofacre Charles L, Suyemoto M Mitsu, McKinley Enid T, Smith Alexandra H, Delago Jodi, Berghaus Roy D, Baxter Virginia A, Smith John A | Journal: Avian diseases | Published: 2026-04-01 | Department: Other | Source: PubMed
